visual_description: A blonde woman with curly hair, wearing a white shirt under a dark cardigan, holds her cheek and closes her eyes while tilting her head back in a crowded indoor setting. The camera then cuts to a man with dark hair and a beard, wearing a patterned sweater, who looks forward with a concerned expression and glances to his side.
audio_description: Ambient crowd chatter and a soft sigh are audible.
